GuidebookDescription: Large noise reduction; slight vertical kick increase from backpressure. Critical for stealth hunts, but still not silent.
Cuts vertical kick and improves follow-up control, but makes the weapon slightly louder.
Best early handling attachment. Reduces horizontal drift and moving spread; cheap enough to give to militia rifles.
Better shoulder weld; reduces kick and makes high-recoil weapons less punishing for average soldiers.
Increases magazine capacity by 35% but reloads slightly slower. Best on SMGs and carbines assigned to chokepoints.
Fast aiming optic. Applies spread reduction while aiming without adding meaningful magnification delay.
Mid-range optic for carbines and DMRs. Improves aimed spread, but slows target acquisition.
High-magnification optic inserted by v1.2 because the v8 patch named it but the handoff tables omitted implementation stats. Balanced between 4X and 16X.
Extreme magnification optic. Best on long-range sniper rifles; strong aimed spread reduction but slow aim time and increased sway tuning.
